title: Cloud asset inventory and discovery
description: Enumerate all cloud resources across accounts, regions, and services to build a complete asset inventory.
acceptance_criteria: All active cloud accounts/subscriptions identified
Resource inventory generated per region
Publicly exposed resources flagged
Cost anomalies that may indicate unauthorized activity reviewed

title: IAM permissions and privilege audit
description: Audit identity and access management — over-permissive roles, unused permissions, service account risks.
acceptance_criteria: Admin/root account usage reviewed
Over-permissive IAM policies identified (wildcard *, AdministratorAccess)
Service accounts with human-equivalent permissions identified
MFA enforcement status for all users verified
Unused access keys and credentials identified

title: Storage and data exposure review
description: Identify publicly accessible storage buckets, databases, and sensitive data exposure.
acceptance_criteria: All storage buckets/containers checked for public access
Publicly accessible databases identified
Sensitive data (PII, secrets) in storage reviewed
Server-side encryption verified for sensitive data stores

title: Network security and configuration review
description: Audit network security groups, firewall rules, VPC configuration, and internet exposure.
acceptance_criteria: Overly permissive security groups (0.0.0.0/0) identified
Unnecessary internet-facing services documented
VPC peering and network segmentation reviewed
Load balancer and CDN security configurations checked

title: Secrets and sensitive data scanning
description: Scan for hardcoded secrets, API keys, and credentials in code repositories, environment variables, and metadata.
acceptance_criteria: All code repositories scanned for leaked secrets
EC2/VM instance metadata API tested for credential exposure
Environment variables and configuration files reviewed
Secrets manager usage assessed vs hardcoded secrets

title: Generate cloud security assessment report
description: Export all cloud security findings with CIS Benchmark and compliance framework mapping.
acceptance_criteria: All findings mapped to CIS Benchmarks or relevant compliance framework
Remediation priority assigned (immediate/short-term/long-term)
Quick wins (high impact, low effort) highlighted
Report exported in requested format
